questionHtml:
Burette readings for a titration are shown.

 

What is the mean titre?

A.  11.1 cm3 ± 0.1 cm3

B.  11.15 cm3 ± 0.05 cm3

C.  11.2 cm3 ± 0.05 cm3

D.  11.2 cm3 ± 0.1 cm3

meta.title: Burette readings for a titration are shown. What is the mean titre? A. 11.1 cm3 ± 0.1 cm3 B. 11.15 cm3 ± 0.05 cm3 C. 11.2 cm3 ± 0.05 cm3 D. 11.2 cm3 ± 0.1 cm3
